case_title: JAWAD MUHAWIEH VS. BOUTROS W. ATTYA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUHAWIEH, JAWAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATTYA, BOUTROS W. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 117 LEXINGTON STREET, APT. 2, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRACISCO, CA 94110, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ATTYA, BOUTROS W.
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ATTYA, BOUTROS W.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUHAWIEH, JAWAD
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $20.58. APPLICATION FOR WRIT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUHAWIEH, JAWAD
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ATTYA, BOUTROS W.
MINUTE ORDER RE: DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT BY POSTING AND MAILING
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUHAWIEH, JAWAD
MINUTE ORDER RE: DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT BY POSTING AND MAILING
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUHAWIEH, JAWAD SERVED OCT-11-2013, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUHAWIEH, JAWAD SERVED OCT-11-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ATTYA, BOUTROS W.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUHAWIEH, JAWAD AS TO DEFENDANT ATTYA, BOUTROS W.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUHAWIEH, JAWAD AS TO DEFENDANT ATTYA, BOUTROS W. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
